description: Existing production source files over the 800-line budget. This is a ratchet baseline: max_lines must not increase, and entries must be removed once files are at or below the limit.

packages/dart/local_db/lib/src/core_tool.reason: Existing local core tool catalog debt; split by tool domain before adding broad behavior.
